title: pittosporum luteum
intro: Pittosporum luteum, also known as Koha or Yellow Pittosporum, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pittosporum luteum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for a range of health conditions.
